title: Array Technologies Tariff Impact and 2024-2025 Earnings Forecast
text: Array Technologies has been impacted by tariffs on solar equipment. Full year 2024 revenue was $916 million with full year adjusted gross margin of 34.1%, improvement of 680 basis points compared to 2023. However, tariff headwinds and pending expiration of U.S. solar tax credit at year-end 2025 continue to concern investors despite strong growth and reasonable valuation. Q1 2026 gross margins benefited roughly 300 basis points from tariff protests that ARRY filed for 2023/2024 tax years, indicating company has been recovering some tariff-related costs through protests. Analyst from Truist Securities noted conclusion of current anti-dumping/countervailing duty (AD/CVD) tariff investigation by end of 2024 could lead to better earnings visibility moving into 2025, with revenue and EBITDA estimates of $947 million and $192 million for 2024. Company noted ongoing industry headwinds including project timeline pushouts and pricing pressures from commodity price declines.
